description: +39 051 890 421. Società Produttori Sementi S.p.A. (PSB) is one of Italy’s oldest and most prestigious agricultural enterprises, specializing in the research, genetic improvement, multiplication, and distribution of certified seeds. For over a century, PSB has been a cornerstone of the Mediterranean agricultural supply chain, bridging the gap between scientific field research and the industrial food sector.
